MindSpore的mindspore.ops.inv是逐元素求倒数（element-wise reciprocal），而PaddlePaddle的paddle.linalg.inv是矩阵求逆（matrix inverse）；二者功能完全不等价，属于语义级不匹配，非精度或实现差异，应跳过跨框架比较。

PaddlePaddle paddle.linalg.inv computes matrix inverse (requires square matrices), while MindSpore mindspore.ops.inv computes element-wise reciprocal — they are fundamentally different operators with incompatible semantics; the observed 'consistent' result on shape [7,0,0] is illusory (both likely return empty tensors without meaningful computation), but functional equivalence does not hold per documentation.
